1333 Num 8 
COMP_ELIG_COPD Include Standardized PCC COPD benes eligible for Cost Composite Indicator for whether specialty-adjusted and risk-adjusted Per Capita Costs for Beneficiaries with Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) standardized measure score included in domain score for practice 1334 Num 8 Equals 1 if specialty-adjusted and risk-adjusted Per Capita Costs for Beneficiaries with Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) standardized measure score included in domain score
